summary: Updated SPEC_TRACKING.md to v1.1. Changes: (1) Updated all 8 FR SRS.md line citations to reflect the 496→531 line shift (e.g., FR-01 L134-L148→L153-L167). FR descriptions are unchanged — security content added to SRS.md is NFR/Risk/Posture, not FR changes. (2) Added NFR Tracking Matrix section with all 8 NFRs (NFR-01..NFR-08), including the new NFR-08 (Security) row citing SRS.md L291 and the §2.6 security posture at L129-L146. (3) Expanded Coverage Statistics with parallel NFR breakdowns and a combined totals table (16 tracked items: 8 FR + 8 NFR). (4) Updated Open Questions with 4 new security-specific items covering NFR-08 testability gaps (log sanitization mechanism, CLI input validation parity, security posture measurability) and R5/R6 adversarial testing, plus a cross-cutting question about whether the SRS expansion requires a SPEC amendment. (5) Added v1.1 change log entry. Document is 260 lines (up from 157).
